content:
# 组合模式：表单页

## 适用场景

新建/编辑数据的表单页面，如新增商品、编辑资料、提交工单。由若干「字段行」纵向排列，底部一个提交按钮。

## 组合方式

外层 CombinedView（layoutMode=flex, direction=column）。每个字段行是一个 CombinedView（direction=column）：标签 TextView + 输入框（TextView 配 decoration 边框模拟输入框，或专用输入视图）。底部提交按钮 TextView 绑定 onClick FlowSchema。

## AI Projection 示例

```json
{
  "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
  "id": "form-page",
  "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
  "size": { "width": 375, "height": 500 },
  "layoutMode": "flex",
  "flexLayout": { "direction": "column", "crossAxisAlignment": "stretch", "gap": 16, "padding": [20, 20, 20, 20] },
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
      "id": "field-name",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 335, "height": 64 },
      "layoutMode": "flex",
      "flexLayout": { "direction": "column", "gap": 6, "crossAxisAlignment": "start" },
      "children": [
        { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "label-name", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 335, "height": 20 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "名称", "style": { "fontSize": 14, "color": "#666666" } } ] } ] } },
        { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "input-name", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 335, "height": 38 }, "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#f5f5f5" }, "radius": 6, "border": { "color": "#d9d9d9", "width": 1 } }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "请输入名称", "style": { "fontSize": 14, "color": "#bfbfbf" } } ] } ] } }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "TEXTVIEW",
      "id": "submit-btn",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 335, "height": 44 },
      "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#1677ff" }, "radius": 8 },
      "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "提交", "style": { "fontSize": 16, "color": "#ffffff", "fontWeight": "bold" } } ], "align": "center" } ] },
      "events": { "onClick": null }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 依赖的 Primitive

primitive-ui-combinedview, primitive-ui-textview

## 说明

- 提交按钮的 `events.onClick` 在此处为 null 占位，实际生成时绑定一个 FlowSchema（见 bindflow 组合模式 composition-bindflow-form-submit）。
- 输入框当前用带边框 TextView 模拟；若运行时提供专用输入视图类型，应优先使用。

metadata.description: 纵向字段表单页，底部提交按钮
